name: Pork Chop Casserole
recipeIngredient: Apples, chopped into half-inch rings, 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soup mix, water, brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a shallow baking dish.
2. Mix well.
3. Layer half of the potatoes, onions, and apples in the dish.
4. Pour the soup mixture over the top layer.
5. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes at 375°F.
